events.name: Bayern Munich at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: A moment of uncertainty from goalkeeper Jonas Urbig allowed Benedict Hollerbach to score a late goal as Union Berlin secured a 1-1 home draw with Bayern Munich.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Hollerbach goal stuns Bayern in Bundesliga

video.headline: Leroy Sane slots home to give Bayern lead

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Leroy Sane slots home to give Bayern lead) 2025/03/15 ESHEET

headlines.description: RB Leipzig snapped their four-match winless streak in the Bundesliga with a 2-0 home victory over Borussia Dortmund on Saturday, boosting their hopes of finishing in the top four.
headlines.shortLinkText: Top-4 chasing RB Leipzig beat struggling Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Loïs Openda scores in the 48') 2025/03/15 ESHEET
